nodes.name: 查理斯·沃爾特·德·維斯
nodes.summary: 查理斯·沃爾特·德·維斯是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联8种鸟类，包括Brown falcon、蓝顶鹛鸫、Yellow-legged flyrobin等8种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: Leslie Christidis
nodes.summary: Leslie Christidis是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括蓝顶鹛鸫，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 人类活动扰动
nodes.summary: 旅游、施工和高频活动影响繁殖或觅食。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.summary: 第二代罗斯柴尔德男爵沃尔特·罗斯柴尔德是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联7种鸟类，包括Striated lorikeet、Doherty's bushshrike、蓝顶鹛鸫等7种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 蓝顶鹛鸫
nodes.summary: 蓝顶鹛鸫（Blue-capped ifrit，学名 Ifrita kowaldi），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联3个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括山地森林，主要威胁包括人类活动扰动。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: thumb|Highland Papua|Highlands in New Guinea Blue-capped ifrits are endemic to Western New Guinea and Papua New Guinea, being found nowhere else on earth, with a distribution of 388,000 km2. They occur in both countries including the Southern Highlands, Western Highlands, Enga, Morobe, and Eastern Highland provinces. The species mainly lives in subtropical and tropical moist montane forests and is highly dependent on the forest ecosystem. It is found from roughly 100 to 4,000 meters (210- 12,070 ft) in elevation, though it is most commonly found at altitudes of or above

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: |date=9 November 2004 |title=Melyrid beetles (Choresine): A putative source for the batrachotoxin alkaloids found in poison-dart frogs and toxic passerine birds |journal=Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences |language=en |volume=101 |issue=45 |pages=15857–15860 |bibcode=2004PNAS..10115857D |doi=10.1073/pnas.0407197101 |issn=0027-8424 |pmc=528779 |pmid=15520388 |doi-access=free}} Despite their toxicity, blue-capped ifrits are non-aggressive and typically found in small groups within high altitude forest habitats. Although they are currently listed as Least concern by the IUCN, their population is slowly declining due to habitat disturbance and limited conservation measures
